"C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2021.2.2\bin\cmake\win\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\glfw_learn.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe cr CMakeFiles\glfw_learn.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\glfw_learn.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\glfw_learn.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o glfw_learn.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libglfw_learn.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\glfw_learn.dir\linklibs.rsp
